home.aboutCardDescription: Learn about the CanadaLogin Partner Portal and how it supports relying party application management.
home.featureAccess: Register, configure, and manage relying party applications connected to CanadaLogin.
home.featureContent: Review application details, manage team access, and update integration configurations.
home.featureObservability: Monitor application health and CanadaLogin Partner Portal backend status from a central dashboard.
home.federalCardDescription: Check the current health and readiness of the CanadaLogin Partner Portal services.
home.heroTitle: Manage your relying party applications in one place.

home.supportCardDescription: Get help and open a support request through the service desk portal.
home.canadaLoginCardDescription: Visit our website to learn more about CanadaLogin.
home.quickLinksBody: Navigate to key areas of the portal.
home.referenceSectionBody: Additional information about the CanadaLogin Partner Portal and related services.
home.signedOutBody: Sign in with your GC identity provider account to access the partner portal.
home.summary: Use your Government of Canada email address to sign in.
home.aboutSectionBody: The CanadaLogin Partner Portal allows you to configure, manage, and monitor your applications connected to CanadaLogin.
home.title: CanadaLogin Partner Portal

about.cardDescription: Learn about CanadaLogin authentication and how it integrates with your services.
about.intro: The CanadaLogin Partner Portal allows organizations to register and manage relying party (RP) applications that use the CanadaLogin service for authentication.
about.sectionFeatureBody: Register new RP applications, manage team access, update configurations, and monitor service health from a single dashboard.
about.sectionIntegrationBody: CanadaLogin provides a standards-based OIDC integration layer that connects your applications to the Government of Canada's identity provider ecosystem.
about.sectionSupportBody: If you need assistance configuring your RP application or have questions about the Partner Portal, contact the CanadaLogin support team.
about.summary: A central hub for managing relying party applications connected to the CanadaLogin service.
about.title: About CanadaLogin Partner Portal

support.intro: Find support for the CanadaLogin Partner Portal.
support.sectionTroubleshootingItem1Body: Try verifying your email address is written correctly and is a valid Government of Canada email address.
support.sectionTroubleshootingItem2Body: We only add applications that are live in production. To request adding an application, submit a ticket.
support.sectionRequestBody: Use the ticketing system to request support. You'll need to receive an invitation and set up an Atlassian account to submit requests.
support.summary: Support resources for relying party application administrators.
support.title: Support

authComplete.summary: Revalidating the backend session before routing you into the protected experience.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.intro: Please read and accept the Terms and Conditions to continue using this application.
termsAndConditions.alreadyAccepted: You have already accepted these Terms and Conditions.
termsAndConditions.section1Body: By using this service, you agree to comply with and be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, you should not use this service.
termsAndConditions.section2Body: Your personal information is collected, used, and disclosed in accordance with applicable privacy laws. By using this service, you consent to the collection and use of your information as described in our privacy notice.
termsAndConditions.section3Body: You agree to use this service only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of others. You must not attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the system.
termsAndConditions.checkboxLabel: I have read and accept the Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.error: An error occurred while accepting the terms. Please try again.
